allow:
Bash(powershell -Command "
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'F:\\Project\\PharmaOps\\frontend\\src\\modules\\branches\\components' | Out-Null
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'F:\\Project\\PharmaOps\\frontend\\src\\modules\\profile\\components' | Out-Null
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'F:\\Project\\PharmaOps\\frontend\\src\\modules\\users\\components' | Out-Null
Write-Host 'Directories created'
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
Remove-Item -Path 'F:\\Project\\PharmaOps\\frontend\\app' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Remove-Item -Path 'F:\\Project\\PharmaOps\\frontend\\components' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Write-Host 'Old root folders removed \(or still locked - check manually\)'
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
Get-ChildItem -Path 'F:\\Project\\PharmaOps\\backend\\app\\routers' -Filter '*.py' | Where-Object { \\$_.Name -ne '__init__.py' } | ForEach-Object {
    Copy-Item \\$_.FullName 'F:\\Project\\PharmaOps\\backend\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\'
}
Write-Host 'Routers copied to api/v1/'
ls 'F:\\Project\\PharmaOps\\backend\\src\\app\\api\\v1\\'
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$v1Path = 'F:\\Project\\PharmaOps\\backend\\src\\app\\api\\v1'
Get-ChildItem -Path \\$v1Path -Filter '*.py' | ForEach-Object {
    \\$content = Get-Content \\$_.FullName -Raw
    \\$content = \\$content -replace 'from app\\.config import', 'from app.core.config import'
    \\$content = \\$content -replace 'from app\\.database import', 'from app.core.database import'
    \\$content = \\$content -replace 'from app\\.firebase_client import', 'from app.core.firebase_client import'
    Set-Content \\$_.FullName \\$content -NoNewline
}
Write-Host 'Router imports updated'
")
